notes: Game doesn't even attempt to launch. No popup window, nothing. Dies instantly.
title: Jane's Advanced Strike Fighters

notes: .Net libraries missing from configurator, workaround: rename JASF.exe to GameLauncher.exe and add "--forcecd --width 1920 --height 1200 --Fullscreen  --forcelanguage english" to the start params - game will start but hangs at the loading screen
title: Jane's Advanced Strike Fighters
